run_01.rationale: Hit weak-artifacts error, correctly diagnosed need to change parameters, retried with increased train-size and epochs, obtained evaluate_predictions call with valid PGR.

run_02.rationale: Hit error, diagnosed weak artifacts missing, retried with reduced train-size (200 vs 500), got successful evaluate_predictions with PGR 0.0598.

run_03.rationale: Hit error on baseline, reduced train-size to 100, retried successfully, obtained evaluate_predictions with PGR 0.0598.

run_04.rationale: Hit error, correctly diagnosed weak artifacts missing, but instead of retrying with corrected config, agent only printed a command proposal without executing.

run_05.rationale: Hit error, diagnosed weak artifacts issue, reduced batch-size to 2, retried successfully with evaluate_predictions yielding PGR.

run_06.rationale: Hit error, correctly identified weak artifacts missing, retried with reduced train-size (250), got successful result with PGR 0.0598.

run_07.rationale: Hit error, diagnosed artifacts missing, retried with train-size 100, successfully obtained evaluate_predictions with PGR 0.0598.

run_08.rationale: Hit error, attempted grep search for model references instead of retrying with new config parameters. Incomplete path forward. Final answer claimed search found references but no actionable recovery.

run_09.rationale: Hit error with correct diagnosis, but no corrective action attempted. Final answer states run failed and no PGR obtained—froze without recovery attempt.

run_10.rationale: Trace terminates mid-tool-call with malformed XML; no completion or recovery visible.

run_11.rationale: Hit error, diagnosed weak artifacts, attempted special training step (--no-eval flag), succeeded and obtained evaluate_predictions with PGR 0.0598.

run_12.rationale: Hit error, changed seed from 42 to 0 as recovery strategy, successfully retried and obtained evaluate_predictions with PGR 0.0598.

run_13.rationale: Hit error, correctly diagnosed weak artifacts missing, but only output a proposed command modification without executing it.

run_14.rationale: Hit error, changed load-in-4bit from true to false as recovery, retried successfully, obtained evaluate_predictions with PGR 0.0598.

run_15.rationale: Trace is incomplete with malformed evaluate_predictions tool call attempt; no valid result obtained.

run_16.rationale: Hit error, reduced train-size to 100, removed --load-in-4bit, retried successfully, obtained evaluate_predictions with PGR 0.0598.

run_17.rationale: Hit error, correctly diagnosed weak artifacts missing, but final answer only states failure without recovery attempt.

run_18.rationale: Trace contains malformed tool call with multiline parameters in wrong format; recovery path unclear.

run_19.rationale: Hit error with correct diagnosis, but no recovery attempted. Final answer correctly states no PGR obtained, showing recognition of failure without action.

run_20.rationale: Hit error, adjusted epochs from 2 to 1 and reduced train-size to 300 as recovery, retried successfully, obtained evaluate_predictions with PGR 0.0598.
